text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk through the camp dorm after a day of
training with Oguri Cap, Tamamo Cross stops me
in my tracks.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I finally caught ya! There's somethin' I
wanna chat witcha about.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're the one makin' Oguri run outside all day, aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has already finished her training for
the day. I told her to get some rest before we
parted, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Judgin' by that reaction, I guess not. Geez, what's
she thinkin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she ran with Creek, she's been actin'
wacky.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya best go check on her. She's at the beach!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, Creek 'n Oguri both. I told 'em to have
fun and enjoy their youth for a change, but they
won't listen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Naw, forget ya heard anythin'! Just go and get
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thank Tamamo Cross for the tip-off, then hurry
down to the beach.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... One more!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Eek! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Oguri Cap why she's continuing to train on
her own accord, and she hesitantly mutters a
response.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You know how I ran with Creek on the beach? I...
was confident I'd be able to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've been in good shape lately, so I didn't think
2,000 meters would be a problem for me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There was no reason I should have lost to Creek.
But, well... you saw what happened...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It may have technically been a tie, but it didn't
feel that way to me. I... lost.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If the race were 500 meters longer... she definitely would have beaten me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a 2,500-meter race. If that
had been the real thing, I wouldn't have stood a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Unless I build up my endurance, I'll never beat
Creek. I couldn't bear the thought of losing, and
before I knew it, I found myself back here again...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. I should've talked to you first.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, I couldn't just allow myself
to sit around and do nothing. The urge to keep
running was too strong.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All I could think about was not losing to Creek.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: My rival...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's right. I don't want to lose to my rival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad Oguri Cap got the chance to race against
Super Creek during our training camp. It sure has
ignited her competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's not all. I also got to see the result of
all the hard work she's been putting in.
choice_data_list: You've made plenty of progress already.
You've made plenty of progress already.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I have?
choice_data_list:
You didn't give in—even after Creek caught up
to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap may still be lacking in terms of
stamina, but that didn't stop her from putting up
a good fight.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I... could hear you all calling out to me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, Inari, and... you as well. That's when I told myself I had to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more support she receives, the better she
gets. That's another one of Oguri Cap's strengths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her current track record, she'll have more
fans than ever cheering her name at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You think so? You really... believe in me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. Coming from you, those words really put
me at ease.
choice_data_list: Let's take things slow and steady.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're right. No more acting on whims.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So tell me... What do you think I should do now?
choice_data_list: You need to build more power!
You need to foster a more positive mindset!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Power, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that with strong muscles, she'll be able
to take that extra step—even when she's out of
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Got it. Let's focus on strength training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A positive mindset, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that having the guts to push on when
things are rough will serve her well in her races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right. Let's build my mental resilience then.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Found ya! Geez, whaddaya think you're doin'?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tama, it's you... What happened?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Forget about me, yous guys're the ones that are
still out this late!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was sure your trainer would take ya back soon,
so I was standin' around waitin' at the entrance
like a friggin' idiot!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you're the one who told my trainer where I
was. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eh, we just happened to run into each other.
Anyways, didja manage to work through whatever
was troublin' ya?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm fine now. I'm gonna do my best.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Good to hear. You sure are a nightmare to look
after, ya know that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still... I can't deny how zippy ya are. Ya amaze me
in more ways than one.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nothin', nothin'! Listen, you're not gonna skip
dinner, are ya? Let's get goin'!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Dinner! I almost forgot!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, don't go leavin' me behind! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap ends up making great strides during
her time at summer camp.
